name: Image Resize
description: Free online image resizer. Change image dimensions and resolution while maintaining quality, all processed locally in your browser.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Upload your image by dropping it or selecting from your device
Set the desired width and height (maintains aspect ratio by default)
Download the resized image when complete
useCase: Perfect for reducing image size for websites, social media, or email attachments.
exampleTasks: Open https://safewebtool.com/image/resize and use Image Resize.
automationNotes: Prefer the stable selectors in this contract over visible text where possible.
Wait for selectors.ready before interacting with the tool UI.
Do not upload private user media to a remote agent service; operate the browser-local UI instead.
